title: Starshine Essentials
body:
# Starshine Essentials
Starshine Essentials requires CIT Resewn and Animatica, or Optifine and incompatible with Eating Animations. 

### Other our resource packs:
- [Starshine Player Totems](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starshine-player-totems)
- [Starshine Foods & Drinks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starshine-foods-and-drinks)

### Totem list ( totem_of_undying ):
- Ликер холова
- Ликер

### Drink list ( potion ):
- Грин дэй
- Первак
- blood
